steps.description: Open Flipkart homepage with affiliate parameters
Capture initial homepage state
Verify H1 brand headline is present
REGRESSION: Check for JavaScript console errors on load
INTEGRATION: Measure page load time and TTFB for homepage
REGRESSION: Validate H1/H2 heading hierarchy on homepage
REGRESSION: Verify all 415 links are reachable and return valid responses
INTEGRATION: Verify Flipkart static asset codes.json API returns 2xx
FUNCTIONAL: Assert search input field is visible on page
FUNCTIONAL: Submit search form empty to trigger validation
FUNCTIONAL: Verify validation or empty-search feedback appears
Capture empty search form submission state
FUNCTIONAL: Type a valid product query into search box
FUNCTIONAL: Assert search suggestions dropdown appears after typing
FUNCTIONAL: Click Search Icon button to submit the search
FUNCTIONAL: Confirm URL navigates to search results page
Capture search results page for Samsung Galaxy S24
SYSTEM E2E: Navigate back to homepage to begin login user journey
SYSTEM E2E: Click Login link to begin authentication flow
SYSTEM E2E: Navigate directly to Login page
SYSTEM E2E: Confirm we are on the login/account page
FUNCTIONAL: Assert OTP login form is visible on login page
FUNCTIONAL: Submit OTP request form with empty mobile number
FUNCTIONAL: Verify error message appears for empty OTP form submission
Capture OTP form empty validation error state
FUNCTIONAL: Fill OTP form with valid test phone number and request OTP
Capture OTP form positive submission state
SYSTEM E2E: Navigate to Sign Up page to validate new user registration link
SYSTEM E2E: Confirm signup page URL is correct
Capture final state — Sign Up page reached successfully
